full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Sarah.

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis was performed twice: (1) The first RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. (2) The second RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 16 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 4.2x10^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 5x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.45 | 7.87
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.8 | 6.07
 | viability [%] | 69.7 | 77.1
 | size [µm] | 8.7 | 7.9
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.77 | 8.79
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 4.35 | 5.74
 | viability [%] | 75.5 | 65.2
 | size [µm] | 9 | 7.8
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.61 | 8.33
total | total [E6 cells] | 16.83 in 3 mL | 24.99 in 3 mL
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 4.075 | 5.905
total | live [E6 cells] | 12.225 in 3 mL | 17.715 in 3 mL
 | viability [%] | 72.6 | 71.15
